questionHtml:
What are polysomes?

A. Strings of amino acids

B. Packages of eight histones with DNA

C. Many ribosomes joined to one mRNA

D. Complexes of tRNA with amino acids

meta.title: What are polysomes? A. Strings of amino acids B. Packages of eight histones with DNA C. Many ribosomes joined to one mRNA D. Complexes of tRNA with amino acids
